lines.text: I  will  be  on  vacation  from  Monday  4.18.11  returning  to  the  office  on  Monday  4.25.11.
The  office  will  be  closed  for  the  week,  in  order  that  the  staff  may  enjoy  their  children's
school  vacation  after  the  long  audit/tax  season.
I  will  be  retrieving  voice  mails  and  emails  each  evening  and  responding  as  needed.
